_comment: Pre-staged bogus auth for the e2e tests. ensureFresh sees the far-future expires_at, short-circuits the OIDC refresh path, sends 'e2e-fake' as the Bearer. The opencode server (no proxy, no JWT validator) accepts any bearer. NEVER use this shape in production -- the e2e tests' whole point is to bypass OIDC for E2E testing.
